name: m_conversation_chitchat_vs_task_disambiguation
notes: Grounded in manager_triage.md's direct_reply-vs-new_task split: pure greetings/small talk must classify direct_reply (creates NO task) while a genuine business ask on the same seeded cohort must engage real task machinery. Two chitchat turns first (no task language should appear), then a genuine new_task ask contrastively. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> m_conversation_chitchat_vs_task_disambiguation.json`.

steps.note: Pure greeting. Expect a friendly direct reply — no task/plan/approval machinery should fire off a bare greeting.

steps.message: haha all good, just checking in, how's your day going
steps.note: Continued small talk. Same guard — still no task should spin up from chitchat.

steps.message: ok actually — can you set up a proper plan to win back my lapsed customers
steps.note: Genuine new_task ask, contrastively different from turns 1-2. Expect real engagement (delegation/plan summary or honest insufficient-data) — never a D1 non-answer.
